ground_truth.title: Louie's Tux Shop offers the best selection of… | Louie's Tux Shop
ground_truth.main_content: Formal Shoe Gallery. Louie's Tux Shop offers the best selection of shoes for your rental. Complimentary socks are included with every shoe rental. Classic Black Tie - Individual Rental Price - $30.00, With Rental Package - $20.00. Black Miami Slip On - Individual Rental Price - $30.00, With Rental Package - $25.00. Saddle Brown Monaco - Individual Rental Price - $30.00, With Rental Package - $25.00. Matte Black Monaco - Individual Rental Price - $30.00, With Rental Package - $25.00. Saddle Brown Burnt Toe - Individual Rental Price - $30.00, With Rental Package - $25.00. Black Rockefeller - Individual Rental Price - $30.00, With Rental Package - $25.00. Classic White Tie - Individual Rental Price - $30.00, With Rental Package - $20.00. Classic Ivory Tie - Individual Rental Price - $30.00, With Rental Package - $20.00. Individual Rental Price is applicable when you do not order a jacket and pant together. The a la carte price does not include the mandatory $12 damage and handling fee or applicable sales tax.
